title: 2023 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
page_name: 2023 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
page_topic: 2023 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
content:
If you're looking for SHOP health coverage for 2023, preview 2023 SHOP plans and prices.

You can download data for 2023 SHOP health plans available to businesses in states where the federal government is operating the SHOP Marketplace. States not included run their own SHOP Marketplaces.

  • Instructions (PDF, 162 KB)
  • 2023 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 2.5 MB)

You can also get:

  • 2023 SHOP dental plan information
  • 2022 SHOP health plan information

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
